title: crusea rubra
intro: Crusea rubra, also known as Red Crusea or Red Clammyweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that is native to parts of Asia, and its medicinal properties have been utilized in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crusea rubra include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Crusea rubra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
